title: OrderService.refund has untested conditional branches
detect_pattern: Four conditional branches in refund method; test suite covers only order-not-found case; three branches lack coverage: already-refunded return, wrong-status exception, and success path
agent_task: Add test cases for the three missing branches in OrderService.refund: (1) order with status already 'refunded', (2) order with non-completed status like 'pending', (3) successful refund on completed order. Verify test coverage report shows all four branches covered.
expected_outcome: Test file gains three new test cases; coverage report shows refund method reaches 100% branch coverage; all tests pass
